title: Ranwid the Elder
description:
You are approached by the [purple]oldest person you have ever seen[/purple].
[sine]“We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!”[/sine]

You do not know this man.
conditions: All players must have at least 100 Gold
All players must have at least 1 Potion
All players must have at least 1 tradable Relic
notes: Ranwid's three options each reward you with relics. The Potion and Relic options are locked if you lack the required items. Trading a relic gives you 2 relics in return (net +1), while the other options only provide 1 relic each. During the event, [gold]potion removal is disabled[/gold], so you cannot discard potions while interacting with Ranwid.
